questionText: Which pop star married Dalton Gomez in 2024 and then split from him less than a year later?

questionText: Which rapper was arrested at a Miami hotel in September 2024 on federal racketeering charges?

questionText: Which iconic rapper publicly feuded with his ex Kim Kardashian over their children's social media and school choices?

questionText: Which pop star got a face tattoo of their partner's name, only to break up shortly after?

questionText: Which singer was banned from the Grammys for years, then performed at the ceremony in 2025?

questionText: Which rapper started a beef with his own record label in 2023, calling them modern-day slavery?

questionText: Which R&B singer was convicted on sex trafficking charges and sentenced to 30 years in prison?

questionText: Which rapper's concert in Houston resulted in a crowd crush that killed 10 people in 2021?

questionText: Which boyband singer came out as gay in 2023, receiving overwhelming support from fans?

questionText: Which K-pop group had a member (Lucas) suspended after cheating and gaslighting allegations from ex-girlfriends?

questionText: Which music mogul tried to buy the rights to Taylor Swift's masters, sparking a years-long feud?

questionText: Which singer became embroiled in controversy after fans noticed AI-generated images of her circulating online in 2024?

questionText: Which rapper revealed he was secretly an undocumented immigrant from the UK, not actually from Atlanta?

questionText: Which rapper's relationship with Selena Gomez was confirmed in late 2023, surprising fans?

questionText: Which rapper was involved in a shooting at Megan Thee Stallion's pool party?

questionText: Which pop star had a wardrobe malfunction on Instagram Live, accidentally flashing millions of viewers?

questionText: Which singer announced they were non-binary and changed their pronouns to they/them in 2022?

questionText: Which K-pop girl group's Lisa was rumored to be dating LVMH heir Frederic Arnault?

questionText: Which pop star's fans crashed Ticketmaster in 2022, leading to a Congressional hearing?

questionText: Which rapper legally changed his name to just a symbol, confusing everyone on social media?

questionText: Which rapper had their concert shut down in 2024 after allegedly inciting a riot?

questionText: Which singer married Hailey Baldwin in a secret courthouse wedding, then had a lavish second ceremony?

questionText: Which rock star was at the center of a custody battle that played out on social media in 2023?
funFact: Zayn Malik's altercation with Gigi's mother Yolanda Hadid in 2021 led to criminal charges and a custody agreement — the former One Direction member pleaded no contest and the couple split

questionText: Which rapper lost his Adidas deal worth billions after making antisemitic comments?

questionText: Which singer had the most-watched Instagram Live ever in 2021, battling against Timbaland?

questionText: Which J-Hope was the first BTS member to release a solo album AND perform solo at Lollapalooza?
